name: agent-context-substrate
description: Non-MCP Codex integration for exporting local Codex threads into Agent Context Substrate artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Finalize Codex threads into local retrieval artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-native operating instructions for Agent Context Substrate. The plugin bundles a Stop hook as the primary finalize trigger and keeps codex-watch available as a fallback without MCP servers.
defaultPrompt: Start ACS codex-watch for this workspace.
Finalize this Codex thread into ACS.
Search ACS knowledge for this project.
